title: Scroll of Biting
move_pattern: Starts at one of Chomp, Chew, or More Teeth (randomly chosen via StarterMoveIdx). Chomp is followed by More Teeth; More Teeth is followed by Chew; Chew is followed by a random branch that picks either Chomp (cannot repeat) or Chew (weight 2).
notes: Starting move is determined by StarterMoveIdx mod 3: 0=Chomp, 1=Chew, 2=More Teeth. Has two random skin variants.
